set -e
APP="$(systemctl show toolbox-admin -p WorkingDirectory --value 2>/dev/null || true)"
[ -n "$APP" ] && [ "$APP" != "/" ] || APP="/www/wwwroot/gjx.vst76.cn"
SERVICE="toolbox-admin"
PORT="${TOOLBOX_PORT:-5088}"
cd "$APP" || exit 1
TS=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
mkdir -p /www/backup 2>/dev/null || true
cat >/tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz.b64 <<'B64'

B64
if command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  base64 -d /tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz.b64 >/tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz
else
  python3 - <<'PY'
import base64, pathlib
pathlib.Path('/tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz').write_bytes(base64.b64decode(pathlib.Path('/tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz.b64').read_text()))
PY
fi
TMP=/tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update
rm -rf "$TMP" && mkdir -p "$TMP"
tar -xzf /tmp/toolbox-client-cleanup-update.tar.gz -C "$TMP"
python3 -m py_compile "$TMP/app.py"
install -m 0644 app.py "/www/backup/toolbox-app-before-client-cleanup-$TS.py"
install -m 0644 "$TMP/app.py" app.py
systemctl restart "$SERVICE"
sleep 2
if ! systemctl is-active --quiet "$SERVICE"; then
  echo "服务启动失败，最近日志："
  journalctl -u "$SERVICE" -n 80 --no-pager
  exit 1
fi
curl -fsS "http://127.0.0.1:$PORT/api/public/brand" >/dev/null
echo "同步完成：编译缓存和生成文件默认保留 1 天，并会自动清理。"
